pageContext.name: Kraken
pageContext.description: The Star Ace Vinyl Model series has begun at last!  In celebration of the 100th Anniversary of the master of movie stop motion animation, Ray Harryhausen, Sideshow and Star Ace are proud to present the Kraken, a giant and fearsome sea monster sent by the gods to destroy mortals that have defied them.  Perhaps Ray Harryhausen's greatest achievement in stop-motion animation, the Kraken is a huge four-armed creature with a long tail and terrifying face.  Traditionally sculpted by the artisans of the famed creature shop of Kaibutsuya, this detailed Kraken Model Kit is made from soft vinyl and stands 13.77' tall and 21.25' long.  Don't miss your chance to add this model kit to your Ray HarryHausen collection today!
